name: Rachel Thompson
employment_history:
McKinsey & Company — Manager (2022-02 → current)
Lead post-merger integration projects in pharmaceuticals and medtech. Drive client engagements with revenue responsibility of EUR 3-5M per project. Manage teams of 6-10 consultants across two parallel engagements. Mentor for two senior associates.

M&A diligence projects in healthcare and consumer goods. Strategy refresh for a top-3 European pharmaceutical company. Co-led a digital transformation engagement at a leading insurance carrier.

Bain & Company — Engagement Manager (2016-08 → 2019-08)
Private equity diligence engagements. Performance improvement projects in retail and consumer goods.

Bain & Company — Associate (2013-09 → 2016-07)
